# terrible_community_general_ipa_otpconfig (Data Source)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this data source against

### Optional

- `ipatokenhotpauthwindow` (Number) HOTP authentication window in number of hops.
- `ipatokenhotpsyncwindow` (Number) HOTP synchronization window in hops.
- `ipatokentotpauthwindow` (Number) TOTP authentication window in seconds.
- `ipatokentotpsyncwindow` (Number) TOTP synchronization window in seconds.

### Read-Only

- `otpconfig` (String) OTP configuration as returned by IPA API.
